title: OpenAI Telemetry Plugin language model prices file schema
description: Schema for the language model prices file used by the OpenAI Telemetry plugin.

$schema.description: The JSON schema reference for validation.

definitions.description: Reusable definitions for YAML anchors. This property has no effect in JSON configs.

prices.description: Map of model names to their pricing information.

input.description: The price per million tokens for input/prompt tokens.

output.description: The price per million tokens for output/completion tokens.
